reviews.comment:
Exelente atención y limpieza del lugar.  Ahora no quieras comer algo porque tenés que hipotecar la casa mínimo ! No sé quién pone los precios pero 2 café con 2 medialunas te gastas 4000$ 17/9/23

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service and the place was very clean. But don't even think about eating there, because you'll need to mortgage your house! I don't know who sets the prices, but two coffees and two croissants will set you back $4000. 17/9/23
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1084216927848101404/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNaODcycFJnEAE

reviews.comment:
Todo muy bien, excelentes baños , un lindo drugstore y un restaurant con buena carta y precios razonables.Las porciones son enormes, si son 4 pidan para 2 y hasta sobra.Recomendabke

(Translated by Google)
Everything was great, excellent restrooms, a nice drugstore, and a restaurant with a good menu and reasonable prices. The portions are huge; if there are four of you, order for two and you'll still have leftovers. Highly recommended.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1084216927848101404/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNaamFmTWFBEAE
